falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes above 5,200 (key resistance level from bottom_2022_may_luna pattern) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a successful breakout rather than a blowoff, contradicting the pattern's failure scenario

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume in the NASDAQ Composite drops below 20% of its 14-day average during the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Abnormally low volume would invalidate the blowoff score's assumption of high-participation price action

falsification_conditions.condition: The 20-day moving average of Bitcoin crosses above the 50-day moving average (golden cross) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This bullish technical signal would directly contradict the pattern's bearish blowoff thesis

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
